content:
🌟 atlantis-android | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: Debugging network traffic from Android applications by capturing and sending it to Proxyman.
✨ Key Features: • Automatic OkHttp traffic interception • WebSocket message capture • Compatibility with Retrofit 2.9+ and Apollo Kotlin 3.x/4.x • Network Service Discovery (NSD) for automatic Proxyman detection • Direct connection support for emulators
📖 Summary: Atlantis Android is a library that captures and inspects HTTP/HTTPS and WebSocket traffic from Android applications. It seamlessly integrates with OkHttp and popular libraries like Retrofit and Apollo, sending the captured data to Proxyman for debugging without requiring proxy configuration or certificate installation.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
